# IconTheme enumeration

The background theme an [`Icon`](./Icon.md) is designed for (spec §14.2).

```csharp
public enum IconTheme
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Light | `0` | The icon is designed for a light background. |
| Dark | `1` | The icon is designed for a dark background. |
